title: Touch Grass Reminder
description: Client-side quilt mod which warns players when they have been excessively playing Minecraft
body:
# touch-grass-reminder

A client-side quilt mod which warns players when they have been excessively playing Minecraft, to go outside and touch grass. [Studies](https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/the-health-effects-of-too-much-gaming-2020122221645) have shown the negative impacts of excessive gaming on the brain. # Features - Configurable reminder frequency. - Togggleable mod functionality. - Modmenu integration. **This mod was inspired by a [recurring joke](https://github.com/CompeyDev/touch-grass-reminder/assets/74418041/a6bbc222-e24e-4b01-a5ae-3645e9080570) in the modrinth discord. lol!**
